question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper describes the genotyping of HIV-1 strains from injecting drug users (IDUs) and sex workers (SWs) in Afghanistan. It mentions that peripheral mononuclear blood cells were isolated for genotyping from Western blot-confirmed specimens.
sentences: "Western blot--confirmed specimens had peripheral mononuclear blood cells isolated for genotyping."; "Genotyping of HIV-1 strains was conducted by using primary peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) by the same methods described in the earlier Kabul analysis."; "Complete genetic sequences were obtained from the 11 participants, with Fig. 1 denoting genotypes by clade."
